TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Kavalan, story: KavNr-frog_api2
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: quwanay zinna ya.
S.PHON: quwanaj z~rinna ja.
S.FORM: quwanay zinna ya.
S.PHON: quwanaj z~rinna ja.

S.FORM: yau a sunis a yau zinna haw.
S.PHON: jau a sunis a jau z~rinna haw.
S.FORM: yau a sunis a yau zinna haw.
S.PHON: jau a sunis a jau z~rinna haw.

S.FORM: qmudu tu wasu kinausa tu wasuna zinna nani.
S.PHON: qmuɮu tu wasu kinausa tu wasuna z~rinna nani.
S.FORM: qmudu tu wasu kinausa tu wasuna zinna nani.
S.PHON: qmuɮu tu wasu kinausa tu wasuna z~rinna nani.

S.FORM: yau a biyatna qudu na ta puduqan zinna.
S.PHON: jau a βijatna quɮu na ta puɮuqan z~rinna.
S.FORM: yau a biyatna qudu na ta puduqan zinna.
S.PHON: jau a βijatna quɮu na ta puɮuqan z~rinna.
S.TRANSL: 有一隻他的青蛙在甕裡.
There is his frog in an urn.

S.FORM: tapeRaskuan nani.
S.PHON: tapəʁaskuan nani.
S.FORM: tapeRaskuan nani.
S.PHON: tapəʁaskuan nani.

S.FORM: tuRabi maynepti ya sunis a yau nani.
S.PHON: tuʁaβi majnəpti ja sunis a jau nani.
S.FORM: tuRabi maynepti ya sunis a yau nani.
S.PHON: tuʁaβi majnəpti ja sunis a jau nani.

S.FORM: wasu a yau nani yauti zinna mawRat ngid qawRat ta biyatna zinna tapuduqan zinna nani.
S.PHON: wasu a jau nani jauti z~rinna mawʁat ŋiɮ qawʁat ta βijatna z~rinna tapuɮuqan z~rinna nani.
S.FORM: wasu a yau nani yauti zinna mawRat ngid qawRat ta biyatna zinna tapuduqan zinna nani.
S.PHON: wasu a jau nani jauti z~rinna mawʁat ŋiɮ qawʁat ta βijatna z~rinna tapuɮuqan z~rinna nani.

TRANSL.notes: (The child) wanted to play with his frog in the urn.

S.TRANSL: wanted to play with his frog in the urn.

S.FORM: sunis a yau mai ngid qaynep nani kaw.
S.PHON: sunis a jau mai ŋiɮ qajnəp nani kaw.
S.FORM: sunis a yau mai ngid qaynep nani kaw.
S.PHON: sunis a jau mai ŋiɮ qajnəp nani kaw.
S.TRANSL: The child didn't want to sleep.

S.FORM: qaswatpaita.
S.PHON: qaswatpaita.
S.FORM: qaswatpaita.
S.PHON: qaswatpaita.

S.FORM: yau a wasuta tmaita tu biyat ta puduqan.
S.PHON: jau a wasuta tmaita tu βijat ta puɮuqan.
S.FORM: yau a wasuta tmaita tu biyat ta puduqan.
S.PHON: jau a wasuta tmaita tu βijat ta puɮuqan.
S.TRANSL: 我們的狗去看瓶子裡的青蛙.
Our dog went to see the frog in the bottle.

S.FORM: zinnati na tapeRaskuan zinnati na sunis a yau zinna nani maswatti ya sunis a yau nani.
S.PHON: z~rinnati na tapəʁaskuan z~rinnati na sunis a jau z~rinna nani maswatti ja sunis a jau nani.
S.FORM: zinnati na tapeRaskuan zinnati na sunis a yau zinna nani maswatti ya sunis a yau nani.
S.PHON: z~rinnati na tapəʁaskuan z~rinnati na sunis a jau z~rinna nani maswatti ja sunis a jau nani.
S.TRANSL: 他說, 在瓶子裡, 他說那個小孩, 他說, 小孩起來了.
He said, in the bottle, he said that the child... He said the child got up.

S.FORM: yauti tmayta tu biyatna zinna nani.
S.PHON: jauti tmajta tu βijatna z~rinna nani.
S.FORM: yauti tmayta tu biyatna zinna nani.
S.PHON: jauti tmajta tu βijatna z~rinna nani.

S.FORM: yau biyat a yau nani nengi taytaanna biyat a yau mai maynaR qaya biyat a yau nani.
S.PHON: jau βijat a jau nani nəŋi tajtaanna βijat a jau mai majnaʁ qaja βijat a jau nani.
S.FORM: yau biyat a yau nani nengi taytaanna biyat a yau mai maynaR qaya biyat a yau nani.
S.PHON: jau βijat a jau nani nəŋi tajtaanna βijat a jau mai majnaʁ qaja βijat a jau nani.
S.TRANSL: 看青蛙很好, 青蛙沒有醒過來.
He saw that the frog was good. The frog didn't wake up.

S.FORM: a mlingi ta biyatna ya sunis a yau zinna.
S.PHON: a mriŋi ta βijatna ja sunis a jau z~rinna.
S.FORM: a mlingi ta biyatna ya sunis a yau zinna.
S.PHON: a mriŋi ta βijatna ja sunis a jau z~rinna.
S.TRANSL: The child was beside the frog.

S.FORM: aizipna atu wasuna zinna haw.
S.PHON: aiz~ripna atu wasuna z~rinna haw.
S.FORM: aizipna atu wasuna zinna haw.
S.PHON: aiz~ripna atu wasuna z~rinna haw.

S.FORM: XXXX wani biyat a yau nani.
S.PHON: **** wani βijat a jau nani.
S.FORM: XXXX wani biyat a yau nani.
S.PHON: **** wani βijat a jau nani.

S.FORM: mRaRiwti zinna ya mudsitti zinna biyat a yau.
S.PHON: mʁaʁiwti z~rinna ja muɮsitti z~rinna βijat a jau.
S.FORM: mRaRiwti zinna ya mudsitti zinna biyat a yau.
S.PHON: mʁaʁiwti z~rinna ja muɮsitti z~rinna βijat a jau.

S.FORM: mudsit tapeRaskuan zinna.
S.PHON: muɮsit tapəʁaskuan z~rinna.
S.FORM: mudsit tapeRaskuan zinna.
S.PHON: muɮsit tapəʁaskuan z~rinna.
S.TRANSL: The frog ran out from the bottle.

S.FORM: ngidti paRaRiw a ya biyat a yau zinna nani.
S.PHON: ŋiɮti paʁaʁiw a ja βijat a jau z~rinna nani.
S.FORM: ngidti paRaRiw a ya biyat a yau zinna nani.
S.PHON: ŋiɮti paʁaʁiw a ja βijat a jau z~rinna nani.
S.TRANSL: The frog wanted to run away.

S.FORM: wani sunis a yau maynep zinna nani.
S.PHON: wani sunis a jau majnəp z~rinna nani.
S.FORM: wani sunis a yau maynep zinna nani.
S.PHON: wani sunis a jau majnəp z~rinna nani.
S.TRANSL: 就是那個小孩子睡著了.

S.FORM: azkaw XXXX ma maiti ya biyat yauti ya biyatna mzukat nani.
S.PHON: az~rkaw **** ma maiti ja βijat jauti ja βijatna mz~rukat nani.
S.FORM: azkaw XXXX ma maiti ya biyat yauti ya biyatna mzukat nani.
S.PHON: az~rkaw **** ma maiti ja βijat jauti ja βijatna mz~rukat nani.
S.TRANSL: 青蛙不見了. 他的青蛙跑走了.
The frog was gone. His frog escaped.

S.FORM: taytaan na sunis a yau nani.
S.PHON: tajtaan na sunis a jau nani.
S.FORM: taytaan na sunis a yau nani.
S.PHON: tajtaan na sunis a jau nani.

S.FORM: azkaw mana maiti ya biyatta ka zin na sunis a yau zinna nani.
S.PHON: az~rkaw mana maiti ja βijatta ka z~rin na sunis a jau z~rinna nani.
S.FORM: azkaw mana maiti ya biyatta ka zin na sunis a yau zinna nani.
S.PHON: az~rkaw mana maiti ja βijatta ka z~rin na sunis a jau z~rinna nani.
S.TRANSL: 小孩想說,我們的青蛙怎麼會不見了.
'Alas, how come our frog was gone,' thought the child.

S.FORM: maswatti zinna sunis a yau ngid qapaR ta biyatna.
S.PHON: maswatti z~rinna sunis a jau ŋiɮ qapaʁ ta βijatna.
S.FORM: maswatti zinna sunis a yau ngid qapaR ta biyatna.
S.PHON: maswatti z~rinna sunis a jau ŋiɮ qapaʁ ta βijatna.
S.TRANSL: 小孩起來想要抓他的青蛙.
The child got up and wanted to catch his frog.

S.FORM: nani ngid qapaR ta biyatna.
S.PHON: nani ŋiɮ qapaʁ ta βijatna.
S.FORM: nani ngid qapaR ta biyatna.
S.PHON: nani ŋiɮ qapaʁ ta βijatna.

TRANSL.notes: (The child) wanted to catch his frog.

S.FORM: maiti tapeRaskuan ngid qapaR nani.
S.PHON: maiti tapəʁaskuan ŋiɮ qapaʁ nani.
S.FORM: maiti tapeRaskuan ngid qapaR nani.
S.PHON: maiti tapəʁaskuan ŋiɮ qapaʁ nani.

TRANSL.notes: (青蛙)不在瓶子裡. (他)想要抓(青蛙).

S.TRANSL: 不在瓶子裡. 想要抓 .

TRANSL.notes: (The frog) was not in the bottle. (He) wanted to catch (the frog).

S.TRANSL: was not in the bottle. wanted to catch .

S.FORM: maiti ya biyat a yau zinna.
S.PHON: maiti ja βijat a jau z~rinna.
S.FORM: maiti ya biyat a yau zinna.
S.PHON: maiti ja βijat a jau z~rinna.

S.FORM: aizipna ta wasuna iza u tmayta ta biyatna ta maiti nani.
S.PHON: aiz~ripna ta wasuna iz~ra u tmajta ta βijatna ta maiti nani.
S.FORM: aizipna ta wasuna iza u tmayta ta biyatna ta maiti nani.
S.PHON: aiz~ripna ta wasuna iz~ra u tmajta ta βijatna ta maiti nani.
S.TRANSL: 他看他的青蛙, 不見了.

TRANSL.notes: (He) looked for his frog. It was gone.

S.TRANSL: looked for his frog. It was gone.

S.FORM: wani zau sunis a zau nani.
S.PHON: wani z~rau sunis a z~rau nani.
S.FORM: wani zau sunis a zau nani.
S.PHON: wani z~rau sunis a z~rau nani.

S.FORM: akaw yau ta tanian smani biyat a yau biyat ce si kaba yu.
S.PHON: akaw jau ta tanian smani βijat a jau βijat ʦə si kaβa ju.
S.FORM: akaw yau ta tanian smani biyat a yau biyat ce si kaba yu.
S.PHON: akaw jau ta tanian smani βijat a jau βijat ʦə si kaβa ju.
S.TRANSL: 那裡…不知道….那個青蛙...這是青蛙嗎?
There…I wonder…that frog…Is this a frog?

S.FORM: biyat.
S.PHON: βijat.
S.FORM: biyat.
S.PHON: βijat.

S.FORM: taytaan na sunis a yau nani akaw yau ka biyat a yau tazian.
S.PHON: tajtaan na sunis a jau nani akaw jau ka βijat a jau taz~rian.
S.FORM: taytaan na sunis a yau nani akaw yau ka biyat a yau tazian.
S.PHON: tajtaan na sunis a jau nani akaw jau ka βijat a jau taz~rian.
S.TRANSL: 小孩一直看…唉呦,我的青蛙在這裡.
The child saw…Alas, my frog was here.

S.FORM: zinnati na Raytunguzan na wasuna 'nay biyat 'nay nani.
S.PHON: z~rinnati na ʁajtuŋuz~ran na wasuna ʔnaj βijat ʔnaj nani.
S.FORM: zinnati na Raytunguzan na wasuna 'nay biyat 'nay nani.
S.PHON: z~rinnati na ʁajtuŋuz~ran na wasuna ʔnaj βijat ʔnaj nani.
S.TRANSL: The dog barked at the frog.

S.FORM: pakalaannati na sunis a yau zinna tu.
S.PHON: pakaraannati na sunis a jau z~rinna tu.
S.FORM: pakalaannati na sunis a yau zinna tu.
S.PHON: pakaraannati na sunis a jau z~rinna tu.

S.FORM: yauti lilizaqti nani.
S.PHON: jauti ririz~raqti nani.
S.FORM: yauti lilizaqti nani.
S.PHON: jauti ririz~raqti nani.

S.FORM: tutumuyannati biyat a yau zinna.
S.PHON: tutumujannati βijat a jau z~rinna.
S.FORM: tutumuyannati biyat a yau zinna.
S.PHON: tutumujannati βijat a jau z~rinna.

TRANSL.notes: (He) played the frog in his hands.

S.TRANSL: played the frog in his hands.

W.TRANSL: 放在手上玩-處焦-3SG.屬格=完成

S.FORM: na sunis qenalizaqan zinna.
S.PHON: na sunis qənariz~raqan z~rinna.
S.FORM: na sunis qenalizaqan zinna.
S.PHON: na sunis qənariz~raqan z~rinna.

S.FORM: nani wiyati mlizaqti ya sunis a yau yauti ya biyatna nani.
S.PHON: nani wijati mriz~raqti ja sunis a jau jauti ja βijatna nani.
S.FORM: nani wiyati mlizaqti ya sunis a yau yauti ya biyatna nani.
S.PHON: nani wijati mriz~raqti ja sunis a jau jauti ja βijatna nani.

TRANSL.notes: 小孩很高興,(因為)青蛙找到了.

S.TRANSL: 小孩很高興, 青蛙找到了.

TRANSL.notes: The child was happy (because) his frog had been found.

S.TRANSL: The child was happy his frog had been found.

S.FORM: syazi tazian nani.
S.PHON: sjaz~ri taz~rian nani.
S.FORM: syazi tazian nani.
S.PHON: sjaz~ri taz~rian nani.

TRANSL.notes: At this point (when it comes here).

S.FORM: Raytutunguzti ya wasuna za.
S.PHON: ʁajtutuŋuz~rti ja wasuna z~ra.
S.FORM: Raytutunguzti ya wasuna za.
S.PHON: ʁajtutuŋuz~rti ja wasuna z~ra.

S.FORM: mlizaqti ya sunisna ya sunis a yau zinna.
S.PHON: mriz~raqti ja sunisna ja sunis a jau z~rinna.
S.FORM: mlizaqti ya sunisna ya sunis a yau zinna.
S.PHON: mriz~raqti ja sunisna ja sunis a jau z~rinna.

S.FORM: azkaw biyatku yauti pakalaanta zinna.
S.PHON: az~rkaw βijatku jauti pakaraanta z~rinna.
S.FORM: azkaw biyatku yauti pakalaanta zinna.
S.PHON: az~rkaw βijatku jauti pakaraanta z~rinna.

S.FORM: mlizaqti ya sunis a yau zinna.
S.PHON: mriz~raqti ja sunis a jau z~rinna.
S.FORM: mlizaqti ya sunis a yau zinna.
S.PHON: mriz~raqti ja sunis a jau z~rinna.

S.FORM: tazian nani wani wasu a zau nani Raytutunguz zinna.
S.PHON: taz~rian nani wani wasu a z~rau nani ʁajtutuŋuz~r z~rinna.
S.FORM: tazian nani wani wasu a zau nani Raytutunguz zinna.
S.PHON: taz~rian nani wani wasu a z~rau nani ʁajtutuŋuz~r z~rinna.
S.TRANSL: It is the dog that barked.

S.FORM: nianti smani biyatna maiti ya biyatna.
S.PHON: nianti smani βijatna maiti ja βijatna.
S.FORM: nianti smani biyatna maiti ya biyatna.
S.PHON: nianti smani βijatna maiti ja βijatna.
S.TRANSL: 不知道他的青蛙在哪裡. 他的青蛙不見了.
I don't know where his frog is. His frog was gone.

S.FORM: Raytunguz a wasu a yau zinna.
S.PHON: ʁajtuŋuz~r a wasu a jau z~rinna.
S.FORM: Raytunguz a wasu a yau zinna.
S.PHON: ʁajtuŋuz~r a wasu a jau z~rinna.

S.FORM: wiyati tazenaan sayza mnangnangiw ya biyat a yau nani.
S.PHON: wijati taz~rənaan sajz~ra mnaŋnaŋiw ja βijat a jau nani.
S.FORM: wiyati tazenaan sayza mnangnangiw ya biyat a yau nani.
S.PHON: wijati taz~rənaan sajz~ra mnaŋnaŋiw ja βijat a jau nani.
S.TRANSL: 青蛙可能去水田游泳了.
Maybe the frog left for the paddy field and swam there.

S.FORM: mdaydawti ya sunis a yau zinna.
S.PHON: mɮajɮawti ja sunis a jau z~rinna.
S.FORM: mdaydawti ya sunis a yau zinna.
S.PHON: mɮajɮawti ja sunis a jau z~rinna.

S.FORM: azkaw nianti ya biyatta mana maiti ka.
S.PHON: az~rkaw nianti ja βijatta mana maiti ka.
S.FORM: azkaw nianti ya biyatta mana maiti ka.
S.PHON: az~rkaw nianti ja βijatta mana maiti ka.
S.TRANSL: 唉呦, 我們的青蛙在哪裡? 為什麼不見了?
Alas, where was our frog? How come it was gone.

S.FORM: mRaRiwti zin na sunis a yau zinna nani.
S.PHON: mʁaʁiwti z~rin na sunis a jau z~rinna nani.
S.FORM: mRaRiwti zin na sunis a yau zinna nani.
S.PHON: mʁaʁiwti z~rin na sunis a jau z~rinna nani.

TRANSL.notes: '(The frog) ran away,' thought the child.

S.FORM: yau tazian nani bawbawaannati ya wasuna sikakabal tu wasuna bawbawa zinna.
S.PHON: jau taz~rian nani βawβawaannati ja wasuna sikakaβar tu wasuna βawβawa z~rinna.
S.FORM: yau tazian nani bawbawaannati ya wasuna sikakabal tu wasuna bawbawa zinna.
S.PHON: jau taz~rian nani βawβawaannati ja wasuna sikakaβar tu wasuna βawβawa z~rinna.

TRANSL.notes: 這邊, (小孩)抱起了狗,對他的狗碎碎念.

S.TRANSL: 這邊, 抱起了狗,對他的狗碎碎念.

TRANSL.notes: Here, (the child) held his dog in the arms and nagged at his dog.

S.TRANSL: Here, held his dog in the arms and nagged at his dog.

S.FORM: ya maiti ya biyatna zinna.
S.PHON: ja maiti ja βijatna z~rinna.
S.FORM: ya maiti ya biyatna zinna.
S.PHON: ja maiti ja βijatna z~rinna.

S.FORM: wani tazi tazianti nani.
S.PHON: wani taz~ri taz~rianti nani.
S.FORM: wani tazi tazianti nani.
S.PHON: wani taz~ri taz~rianti nani.

S.FORM: yauti ya sunis a yau qmRaRas.
S.PHON: jauti ja sunis a jau qmʁaʁas.
S.FORM: yauti ya sunis a yau qmRaRas.
S.PHON: jauti ja sunis a jau qmʁaʁas.

S.FORM: qeqeRasanna na mai zinna.
S.PHON: qəqəʁasanna na mai z~rinna.
S.FORM: qeqeRasanna na mai zinna.
S.PHON: qəqəʁasanna na mai z~rinna.

S.FORM: yau wasuna mRaytungtunguz.
S.PHON: jau wasuna mʁajtuŋtuŋuz~r.
S.FORM: yau wasuna mRaytungtunguz.
S.PHON: jau wasuna mʁajtuŋtuŋuz~r.

S.FORM: mai zinna nani.
S.PHON: mai z~rinna nani.
S.FORM: mai zinna nani.
S.PHON: mai z~rinna nani.

S.FORM: kaw quniakita maiti ya biyatta zinna nani.
S.PHON: kaw quniakita maiti ja βijatta z~rinna nani.
S.FORM: kaw quniakita maiti ya biyatta zinna nani.
S.PHON: kaw quniakita maiti ja βijatta z~rinna nani.
S.TRANSL: '我們怎麼辦?我們的青蛙不見了'小孩這樣想.
'What could we do? Our frog was gone,' thought the child.

S.FORM: syazi tazian nani.
S.PHON: sjaz~ri taz~rian nani.
S.FORM: syazi tazian nani.
S.PHON: sjaz~ri taz~rian nani.

TRANSL.notes: At this point (when it comes here).

S.FORM: tapapaRinan nani.
S.PHON: tapapaʁinan nani.
S.FORM: tapapaRinan nani.
S.PHON: tapapaʁinan nani.

S.FORM: yauti zinna ya yau a dubu na penay zinna.
S.PHON: jauti z~rinna ja jau a ɮuβu na pənaj z~rinna.
S.FORM: yauti zinna ya yau a dubu na penay zinna.
S.PHON: jauti z~rinna ja jau a ɮuβu na pənaj z~rinna.

S.FORM: penay tababaw na paRin zinna nani.
S.PHON: pənaj taβaβaw na paʁin z~rinna nani.
S.FORM: penay tababaw na paRin zinna nani.
S.PHON: pənaj taβaβaw na paʁin z~rinna nani.
S.TRANSL: There were bees in the tree.

S.FORM: yauti ya wasuna mRaytungtunguz zinna tu penay a yau zinna.
S.PHON: jauti ja wasuna mʁajtuŋtuŋuz~r z~rinna tu pənaj a jau z~rinna.
S.FORM: yauti ya wasuna mRaytungtunguz zinna tu penay a yau zinna.
S.PHON: jauti ja wasuna mʁajtuŋtuŋuz~r z~rinna tu pənaj a jau z~rinna.
S.TRANSL: The dog was barking at the bees.

S.FORM: nani wani sunis a yau nani akaw mangaita qaRatanna sayza nani.
S.PHON: nani wani sunis a jau nani akaw maŋaita qaʁatanna sajz~ra nani.
S.FORM: nani wani sunis a yau nani akaw mangaita qaRatanna sayza nani.
S.PHON: nani wani sunis a jau nani akaw maŋaita qaʁatanna sajz~ra nani.

TRANSL.notes: The child was afraid that they might be bitten (by the bees).

S.TRANSL: The child was afraid that they might be bitten .

S.FORM: qmubetti sunis a yau zinna.
S.PHON: qmuβətti sunis a jau z~rinna.
S.FORM: qmubetti sunis a yau zinna.
S.PHON: qmuβətti sunis a jau z~rinna.

S.FORM: XXXX ya lazatna penay a yau zinna tazian nani ngidanna zaqis na wasu 'nay penay a yau nani.
S.PHON: **** ja raz~ratna pənaj a jau z~rinna taz~rian nani ŋiɮanna z~raqis na wasu ʔnaj pənaj a jau nani.
S.FORM: XXXX ya lazatna penay a yau zinna tazian nani ngidanna zaqis na wasu 'nay penay a yau nani.
S.PHON: **** ja raz~ratna pənaj a jau z~rinna taz~rian nani ŋiɮanna z~raqis na wasu ʔnaj pənaj a jau nani.

TRANSL.notes: The dog wanted to climb up to (do something with) the bees.

S.TRANSL: The dog wanted to climb up to the bees.

S.FORM: yauti ya biyat a yau pakalaanna sayza nani yau mlizaqti zinna ya lazat ya sunis a yau.
S.PHON: jauti ja βijat a jau pakaraanna sajz~ra nani jau mriz~raqti z~rinna ja raz~rat ja sunis a jau.
S.FORM: yauti ya biyat a yau pakalaanna sayza nani yau mlizaqti zinna ya lazat ya sunis a yau.
S.PHON: jauti ja βijat a jau pakaraanna sajz~ra nani jau mriz~raqti z~rinna ja raz~rat ja sunis a jau.
S.TRANSL: The frog was found. The child felt happy.

S.FORM: kalaannati ya biyatna nani.
S.PHON: karaannati ja βijatna nani.
S.FORM: kalaannati ya biyatna nani.
S.PHON: karaannati ja βijatna nani.

S.FORM: wani penay a yau mlalsitti lazatna nani.
S.PHON: wani pənaj a jau mrarsitti raz~ratna nani.
S.FORM: wani penay a yau mlalsitti lazatna nani.
S.PHON: wani pənaj a jau mrarsitti raz~ratna nani.
S.TRANSL: 蜜蜂一個接一個跑出來.

TRANSL.notes: The bees went out (of the beehive) one by one.

S.TRANSL: The bees went out one by one.

W.TRANSL: 主焦-一個接著一個跑出去=完成

S.FORM: Raytungtunguzanna wasuna na muRingti zinna ya lazatna.
S.PHON: ʁajtuŋtuŋuz~ranna wasuna na muʁiŋti z~rinna ja raz~ratna.
S.FORM: Raytungtunguzanna wasuna na muRingti zinna ya lazatna.
S.PHON: ʁajtuŋtuŋuz~ranna wasuna na muʁiŋti z~rinna ja raz~ratna.

TRANSL.notes: The dog was barking. The person (the child) was crying.

S.TRANSL: The dog was barking. The person was crying.

S.FORM: maytis qaqaRatan na penay sayza.
S.PHON: majtis qaqaʁatan na pənaj sajz~ra.
S.FORM: maytis qaqaRatan na penay sayza.
S.PHON: majtis qaqaʁatan na pənaj sajz~ra.
S.TRANSL: They were afraid that they might be bitten by the bees.

S.FORM: nani syazi tazian nani.
S.PHON: nani sjaz~ri taz~rian nani.
S.FORM: nani syazi tazian nani.
S.PHON: nani sjaz~ri taz~rian nani.

TRANSL.notes: At this point (when it comes here).

S.FORM: yauti ya biyat a yau nangnangiw ta zenaan zinna izau.
S.PHON: jauti ja βijat a jau naŋnaŋiw ta z~rənaan z~rinna iz~rau.
S.FORM: yauti ya biyat a yau nangnangiw ta zenaan zinna izau.
S.PHON: jauti ja βijat a jau naŋnaŋiw ta z~rənaan z~rinna iz~rau.
S.TRANSL: The frog was swimming in the paddy field.

S.FORM: nani wani wasu a zau nani tanuzannati na penay sayza nani.
S.PHON: nani wani wasu a z~rau nani tanuz~rannati na pənaj sajz~ra nani.
S.FORM: nani wani wasu a zau nani tanuzannati na penay sayza nani.
S.PHON: nani wani wasu a z~rau nani tanuz~rannati na pənaj sajz~ra nani.
S.TRANSL: It was the dog that the bees were chasing.

S.FORM: maytisti ya wasu a yau ngid zaqis ngid zaqis tu paRinna.
S.PHON: majtisti ja wasu a jau ŋiɮ z~raqis ŋiɮ z~raqis tu paʁinna.
S.FORM: maytisti ya wasu a yau ngid zaqis ngid zaqis tu paRinna.
S.PHON: majtisti ja wasu a jau ŋiɮ z~raqis ŋiɮ z~raqis tu paʁinna.
S.TRANSL: The dog was scared and wanted to climb up the tree.

S.FORM: Rayngu nani.
S.PHON: ʁajŋu nani.
S.FORM: Rayngu nani.
S.PHON: ʁajŋu nani.

S.FORM: wani sunis a zau nani yauti tapapaRin wiyati mzaqis tapaRinanna sunisna yau sunis a yau zinna.
S.PHON: wani sunis a z~rau nani jauti tapapaʁin wijati mz~raqis tapaʁinanna sunisna jau sunis a jau z~rinna.
S.FORM: wani sunis a zau nani yauti tapapaRin wiyati mzaqis tapaRinanna sunisna yau sunis a yau zinna.
S.PHON: wani sunis a z~rau nani jauti tapapaʁin wijati mz~raqis tapaʁinanna sunisna jau sunis a jau z~rinna.
S.TRANSL: 在樹這邊. 小孩爬上樹.
At the tree. The child climbed up the tree.

S.FORM: maytis tu penay.
S.PHON: majtis tu pənaj.
S.FORM: maytis tu penay.
S.PHON: majtis tu pənaj.

S.FORM: syazi tazian nani.
S.PHON: sjaz~ri taz~rian nani.
S.FORM: syazi tazian nani.
S.PHON: sjaz~ri taz~rian nani.

TRANSL.notes: At this point (when it comes here).

S.FORM: tmaytati tu adam a sunis a yau zinna nani.
S.PHON: tmajtati tu aɮam a sunis a jau z~rinna nani.
S.FORM: tmaytati tu adam a sunis a yau zinna nani.
S.PHON: tmajtati tu aɮam a sunis a jau z~rinna nani.

S.FORM: yaupama penay a zau XXXX tentenbaseR zinna tmanuz tu wasuna.
S.PHON: jaupama pənaj a z~rau **** təntənβasəʁ z~rinna tmanuz~r tu wasuna.
S.FORM: yaupama penay a zau XXXX tentenbaseR zinna tmanuz tu wasuna.
S.PHON: jaupama pənaj a z~rau **** təntənβasəʁ z~rinna tmanuz~r tu wasuna.
S.TRANSL: 蜜蜂還在飛,追著他的狗.
The bees were still flying, chasing his dog.

S.FORM: nani azkaw qunianti yau a adam.
S.PHON: nani az~rkaw qunianti jau a aɮam.
S.FORM: nani azkaw qunianti yau a adam.
S.PHON: nani az~rkaw qunianti jau a aɮam.
S.TRANSL: Alas, how come there was a bird.

S.FORM: yau a penay na zinna na sunsunis suzitanti zinna qenaytisan.
S.PHON: jau a pənaj na z~rinna na sunsunis suz~ritanti z~rinna qənajtisan.
S.FORM: yau a penay na zinna na sunsunis suzitanti zinna qenaytisan.
S.PHON: jau a pənaj na z~rinna na sunsunis suz~ritanti z~rinna qənajtisan.

TRANSL.notes: 有蜜蜂. 小孩(因為)害怕就掉下去了.

S.TRANSL: 有蜜蜂. 小孩 害怕就掉下去了.
There were bees. The child fell down out of fear.

S.FORM: matatanaqti ta wasuna zinna.
S.PHON: matatanaqti ta wasuna z~rinna.
S.FORM: matatanaqti ta wasuna zinna.
S.PHON: matatanaqti ta wasuna z~rinna.

TRANSL.notes: (The child) got separated from his dog.

S.FORM: yau a wasuna mRaytungtunguz.
S.PHON: jau a wasuna mʁajtuŋtuŋuz~r.
S.FORM: yau a wasuna mRaytungtunguz.
S.PHON: jau a wasuna mʁajtuŋtuŋuz~r.

S.FORM: maRiw maytis tu penay zinna.
S.PHON: maʁiw majtis tu pənaj z~rinna.
S.FORM: maRiw maytis tu penay zinna.
S.PHON: maʁiw majtis tu pənaj z~rinna.

TRANSL.notes: (It) ran away (because it) was afraid of the bees.

S.TRANSL: ran away was afraid of the bees.

S.FORM: nani wani zau nani azkaw qunianti yau a adam.
S.PHON: nani wani z~rau nani az~rkaw qunianti jau a aɮam.
S.FORM: nani wani zau nani azkaw qunianti yau a adam.
S.PHON: nani wani z~rau nani az~rkaw qunianti jau a aɮam.
S.TRANSL: Alas, what should we do? There was a bird.

S.FORM: mangaiku XXXX qaRatanna mangaiku dudutanna adam zinna sayza na maytis a sunis a zau zinna.
S.PHON: maŋaiku **** qaʁatanna maŋaiku ɮuɮutanna aɮam z~rinna sajz~ra na majtis a sunis a z~rau z~rinna.
S.FORM: mangaiku XXXX qaRatanna mangaiku dudutanna adam zinna sayza na maytis a sunis a zau zinna.
S.PHON: maŋaiku **** qaʁatanna maŋaiku ɮuɮutanna aɮam z~rinna sajz~ra na majtis a sunis a z~rau z~rinna.
S.TRANSL: '我怕被咬,被鳥叮'小孩這樣想. 小孩很害怕.
'I am afraid of being bitten…being stung by the bird,' thought the child. The child was scared.

S.FORM: tazian nani nianti smani wasuna.
S.PHON: taz~rian nani nianti smani wasuna.
S.FORM: tazian nani nianti smani wasuna.
S.PHON: taz~rian nani nianti smani wasuna.
S.TRANSL: 不知道他的狗到哪去了.
I don't know where his dog was.

S.FORM: syazi tazian nani.
S.PHON: sjaz~ri taz~rian nani.
S.FORM: syazi tazian nani.
S.PHON: sjaz~ri taz~rian nani.

TRANSL.notes: At this point (when it comes here),

S.FORM: qu qmRasti zinna ya sunis a yau Ras qmRas ta wasuna sayza.
S.PHON: qu qmʁasti z~rinna ja sunis a jau ʁas qmʁas ta wasuna sajz~ra.
S.FORM: qu qmRasti zinna ya sunis a yau Ras qmRas ta wasuna sayza.
S.PHON: qu qmʁasti z~rinna ja sunis a jau ʁas qmʁas ta wasuna sajz~ra.
S.TRANSL: Perhaps the child was yelling at his dog.

S.FORM: ya wasuna maynep zinna.
S.PHON: ja wasuna majnəp z~rinna.
S.FORM: ya wasuna maynep zinna.
S.PHON: ja wasuna majnəp z~rinna.

S.FORM: nani qaqaRasanna wasuna na mai yau biyat taytaanna tamdawudan ya biyat a yau zinna.
S.PHON: nani qaqaʁasanna wasuna na mai jau βijat tajtaanna tamɮawuɮan ja βijat a jau z~rinna.
S.FORM: nani qaqaRasanna wasuna na mai yau biyat taytaanna tamdawudan ya biyat a yau zinna.
S.PHON: nani qaqaʁasanna wasuna na mai jau βijat tajtaanna tamɮawuɮan ja βijat a jau z~rinna.
S.TRANSL: 小孩叫狗, 青蛙在遠方看小孩.
The child was yelling at the dog. The frog was looking at the child from afar.

S.FORM: qmRas ta wasuna qmRas ta biyat a yau sayza ta biyatna ya sunis a zau haw nani.
S.PHON: qmʁas ta wasuna qmʁas ta βijat a jau sajz~ra ta βijatna ja sunis a z~rau haw nani.
S.FORM: qmRas ta wasuna qmRas ta biyat a yau sayza ta biyatna ya sunis a zau haw nani.
S.PHON: qmʁas ta wasuna qmʁas ta βijat a jau sajz~ra ta βijatna ja sunis a z~rau haw nani.
S.TRANSL: 這個小孩叫他的狗和青蛙.
This child was calling his dog and the frog.

S.FORM: syazi tazian nani.
S.PHON: sjaz~ri taz~rian nani.
S.FORM: syazi tazian nani.
S.PHON: sjaz~ri taz~rian nani.

TRANSL.notes: At this point (when it comes here),

S.FORM: yauti ya sunis a yau situRku tmayta.
S.PHON: jauti ja sunis a jau situʁku tmajta.
S.FORM: yauti ya sunis a yau situRku tmayta.
S.PHON: jauti ja sunis a jau situʁku tmajta.
S.TRANSL: The child looked down and saw…

S.FORM: ta yau a wasuta ka.
S.PHON: ta jau a wasuta ka.
S.FORM: ta yau a wasuta ka.
S.PHON: ta jau a wasuta ka.

S.FORM: mai mai ya wasuta mai mRaRiw ya wasuta.
S.PHON: mai mai ja wasuta mai mʁaʁiw ja wasuta.
S.FORM: mai mai ya wasuta mai mRaRiw ya wasuta.
S.PHON: mai mai ja wasuta mai mʁaʁiw ja wasuta.
S.TRANSL: The dog did not run away.

S.FORM: mai qaRatan na penay.
S.PHON: mai qaʁatan na pənaj.
S.FORM: mai qaRatan na penay.
S.PHON: mai qaʁatan na pənaj.

TRANSL.notes: (The dog) was not bitten by the bees.

S.TRANSL: was not bitten by the bees.

S.FORM: mai wasuna mai ka tazian tu wasu.
S.PHON: mai wasuna mai ka taz~rian tu wasu.
S.FORM: mai wasuna mai ka tazian tu wasu.
S.PHON: mai wasuna mai ka taz~rian tu wasu.

S.FORM: yau a wasuta mai qaRatan na penay zin na sunis a yau zinna.
S.PHON: jau a wasuta mai qaʁatan na pənaj z~rin na sunis a jau z~rinna.
S.FORM: yau a wasuta mai qaRatan na penay zin na sunis a yau zinna.
S.PHON: jau a wasuta mai qaʁatan na pənaj z~rin na sunis a jau z~rinna.
S.TRANSL: 狗沒有被蜜蜂咬,小孩這樣想.
'The dog was not bitten by the bees,' thought the child.

S.FORM: syazi tazian na yauti ya siRmuq zinna.
S.PHON: sjaz~ri taz~rian na jauti ja siʁmuq z~rinna.
S.FORM: syazi tazian na yauti ya siRmuq zinna.
S.PHON: sjaz~ri taz~rian na jauti ja siʁmuq z~rinna.

TRANSL.notes: At this point (when it comes here), there was a deer.

S.TRANSL: At this point , there was a deer.

S.FORM: masulun tu wasuna ya siRmuq a yau.
S.PHON: masurun tu wasuna ja siʁmuq a jau.
S.FORM: masulun tu wasuna ya siRmuq a yau.
S.PHON: masurun tu wasuna ja siʁmuq a jau.
S.TRANSL: The deer was with his dog.

S.FORM: wani siRmuq a yau nani.
S.PHON: wani siʁmuq a jau nani.
S.FORM: wani siRmuq a yau nani.
S.PHON: wani siʁmuq a jau nani.

S.FORM: nengi sayza na bebabaannati na na.
S.PHON: nəŋi sajz~ra na βəβaβaannati na na.
S.FORM: nengi sayza na bebabaannati na na.
S.PHON: nəŋi sajz~ra na βəβaβaannati na na.

W.TRANSL: 跑到背上-處焦-3SG.屬格=完成

S.FORM: sunis a yau babaannati na siRmuq a sunis a yau zinna.
S.PHON: sunis a jau βaβaannati na siʁmuq a sunis a jau z~rinna.
S.FORM: sunis a yau babaannati na siRmuq a sunis a yau zinna.
S.PHON: sunis a jau βaβaannati na siʁmuq a sunis a jau z~rinna.
S.TRANSL: The deer carried the child on the back.

S.FORM: tazian maytis tu penay sayza.
S.PHON: taz~rian majtis tu pənaj sajz~ra.
S.FORM: tazian maytis tu penay sayza.
S.PHON: taz~rian majtis tu pənaj sajz~ra.

TRANSL.notes: Perhaps (the child) was afraid of the bees.

S.TRANSL: Perhaps was afraid of the bees.

S.FORM: nani zau nani akaw penay a zau naquni smani benababaanna sunis a yau tu qabaw nani. XXXX
S.PHON: nani z~rau nani akaw pənaj a z~rau naquni smani βənaβaβaanna sunis a jau tu qaβaw nani. ****
S.FORM: nani zau nani akaw penay a zau naquni smani benababaanna sunis a yau tu qabaw nani. XXXX
S.PHON: nani z~rau nani akaw pənaj a z~rau naquni smani βənaβaβaanna sunis a jau tu qaβaw nani. ****
S.TRANSL: 唉呦,有蜜蜂. 我不知道小孩怎麼跑到鹿的背上.
Alas, there were bees. I don't know how the child mounted the cattle.

S.FORM: siRmuq a yau suzitanti sunis a yau qenalizaqan.
S.PHON: siʁmuq a jau suz~ritanti sunis a jau qənariz~raqan.
S.FORM: siRmuq a yau suzitanti sunis a yau qenalizaqan.
S.PHON: siʁmuq a jau suz~ritanti sunis a jau qənariz~raqan.
S.TRANSL: 鹿太高興,小孩就掉下去.
The child fell down because the deer was too happy.

S.FORM: yau a wasuna qaya zinna tazian.
S.PHON: jau a wasuna qaja z~rinna taz~rian.
S.FORM: yau a wasuna qaya zinna tazian.
S.PHON: jau a wasuna qaja z~rinna taz~rian.

S.FORM: XXXX nayau a lanasna na biyat a zau tu lazatna.
S.PHON: **** najau a ranasna na βijat a z~rau tu raz~ratna.
S.FORM: XXXX nayau a lanasna na biyat a zau tu lazatna.
S.PHON: **** najau a ranasna na βijat a z~rau tu raz~ratna.

TRANSL.notes: 他的故事就是那樣,(關於)他的青蛙對他的主人.

S.TRANSL: 他的故事就是那樣, 他的青蛙對他的主人.

TRANSL.notes: His story is like this, (about) his frog to his owner.

S.TRANSL: His story is like this, his frog to his owner.

S.FORM: nani tazianti nani.
S.PHON: nani taz~rianti nani.
S.FORM: nani tazianti nani.

S.FORM: yauti tazian nani.
S.PHON: jauti taz~rian nani.
S.FORM: yauti tazian nani.
S.PHON: jauti taz~rian nani.

S.FORM: yauti ya lazatna.
S.PHON: jauti ja raz~ratna.
S.FORM: yauti ya lazatna.
S.PHON: jauti ja raz~ratna.

S.FORM: mlilizaqti sayza nani.
S.PHON: mririz~raqti sajz~ra nani.
S.FORM: mlilizaqti sayza nani.
S.PHON: mririz~raqti sajz~ra nani.

S.FORM: suzitanti lazat tu nian smani Raynguanku.
S.PHON: suz~ritanti raz~rat tu nian smani ʁajŋuanku.
S.FORM: suzitanti lazat tu nian smani Raynguanku.
S.PHON: suz~ritanti raz~rat tu nian smani ʁajŋuanku.
S.TRANSL: 人還是什麼跌倒,我也不知道.
The person or something else fell. I am not sure.

S.FORM: lazatnaay lazat sayzi yau limana nani.
S.PHON: raz~ratnaaj raz~rat sajz~ri jau rimana nani.
S.FORM: lazatnaay lazat sayzi yau limana nani.

S.FORM: mlizaqti sayza.
S.PHON: mriz~raqti sajz~ra.
S.FORM: mlizaqti sayza.

S.FORM: yau siRmuq a yau situRku tata zinna.
S.PHON: jau siʁmuq a jau situʁku tata z~rinna.
S.FORM: yau siRmuq a yau situRku tata zinna.
S.PHON: jau siʁmuq a jau situʁku tata z~rinna.
S.TRANSL: The deer was looking down at him.

S.FORM: tazian.
S.PHON: taz~rian.
S.FORM: tazian.
S.PHON: taz~rian.

S.FORM: syazi tazian nani.
S.PHON: sjaz~ri taz~rian nani.

S.PHON: qa mriz~raqti.
S.FORM: qa mlizaqti.

S.FORM: yauti ya ya wasuna nani.
S.PHON: jauti ja ja wasuna nani.
S.FORM: yauti ya ya wasuna nani.

S.FORM: babaap bebabaannati na wasu a yau.
S.PHON: βaβaap βəβaβaannati na wasu a jau.
S.FORM: babaap bebabaannati na wasu a yau.

W.TRANSL: 跑到背上-處焦-3SG.屬格=完成

S.FORM: yubaannati ta uRuanna zinna ya wasu a yau.
S.PHON: juβaannati ta uʁuanna z~rinna ja wasu a jau.
S.FORM: yubaannati ta uRuanna zinna ya wasu a yau.
S.PHON: juβaannati ta uʁuanna z~rinna ja wasu a jau.
S.TRANSL: The deer placed the dog on the nape.

W.TRANSL: 放在脖子上-處焦-3SG.屬格=完成

S.FORM: qenalizaqan zinna.
S.PHON: qənariz~raqan z~rinna.
S.FORM: qenalizaqan zinna.
S.PHON: qənariz~raqan z~rinna.

S.FORM: biyat a yau nani wi smasaqay sayza.
S.PHON: βijat a jau nani wi smasaqaj sajz~ra.
S.FORM: biyat a yau nani wi smasaqay sayza.
S.PHON: βijat a jau nani wi smasaqaj sajz~ra.
S.TRANSL: Perhaps the frog left and played around.

S.FORM: tazenaan tazanzanuman.
S.PHON: taz~rənaan taz~ranz~ranuman.
S.FORM: tazenaan tazanzanuman.
S.PHON: taz~rənaan taz~ranz~ranuman.
S.TRANSL: In the paddy fields, at the waterside.

S.FORM: zau nani qu naRinisu Raytunguz.
S.PHON: z~rau nani qu naʁinisu ʁajtuŋuz~r.
S.FORM: zau nani qu naRinisu Raytunguz.

S.FORM: qalimekka.
S.PHON: qariməkka.
S.FORM: qalimekka.
S.PHON: qariməkka.

S.FORM: zin na sun sunis a yau zinna ya wasuna.
S.PHON: z~rin na sun sunis a jau z~rinna ja wasuna.
S.FORM: zin na sun sunis a yau zinna ya wasuna.
S.PHON: z~rin na sun sunis a jau z~rinna ja wasuna.
S.TRANSL: The child said to his dog.

S.FORM: naRin mRaytungtunguz qalimekka zinna.
S.PHON: naʁin mʁajtuŋtuŋuz~r qariməkka z~rinna.
S.FORM: naRin mRaytungtunguz qalimekka zinna.
S.PHON: naʁin mʁajtuŋtuŋuz~r qariməkka z~rinna.

S.FORM: yauti tazian nani.
S.PHON: jauti taz~rian nani.
S.FORM: yauti tazian nani.
S.PHON: jauti taz~rian nani.

S.FORM: yau niania smani ya pengpengkedan na wasuna.
S.PHON: jau niania smani ja pəŋpəŋkəɮan na wasuna.
S.FORM: yau niania smani ya pengpengkedan na wasuna.
S.PHON: jau niania smani ja pəŋpəŋkəɮan na wasuna.
S.TRANSL: 不知道他的狗左顧右盼看什麼.
I don't know what his dog was looking around at.

S.FORM: nian smani ngidan na wasuna zinna wasu na sunis a yau.
S.PHON: nian smani ŋiɮan na wasuna z~rinna wasu na sunis a jau.
S.FORM: nian smani ngidan na wasuna zinna wasu na sunis a yau.
S.PHON: nian smani ŋiɮan na wasuna z~rinna wasu na sunis a jau.
S.TRANSL: I don't know what his dog wanted.

S.FORM: yau tazian nani.
S.PHON: jau taz~rian nani.
S.FORM: yau tazian nani.
S.PHON: jau taz~rian nani.

S.FORM: yauti m tmayta ta wasuna zinna.
S.PHON: jauti m tmajta ta wasuna z~rinna.
S.FORM: yauti m tmayta ta wasuna zinna.
S.PHON: jauti m tmajta ta wasuna z~rinna.

S.FORM: yauti ya biyat uzusati ya biyat a yau zinna.
S.PHON: jauti ja βijat uz~rusati ja βijat a jau z~rinna.
S.FORM: yauti ya biyat uzusati ya biyat a yau zinna.
S.PHON: jauti ja βijat uz~rusati ja βijat a jau z~rinna.

S.FORM: qmeRas tu 'daqna sayza ya biyat a yau nani.
S.PHON: qməʁas tu ʔɮaqna sajz~ra ja βijat a jau nani.
S.FORM: qmeRas tu 'daqna sayza ya biyat a yau nani.
S.PHON: qməʁas tu ʔɮaqna sajz~ra ja βijat a jau nani.
S.TRANSL: 可能這隻青蛙叫了其他的青蛙.
Perhaps the frog called other frogs.

S.FORM: malusiq nani uzusati ya biyat a yau nani.
S.PHON: marusiq nani uz~rusati ja βijat a jau nani.
S.FORM: malusiq nani uzusati ya biyat a yau nani.
S.PHON: marusiq nani uz~rusati ja βijat a jau nani.
S.TRANSL: 原本只有一隻, 變成兩隻青蛙.
Originally, there was one frog, but there were two frogs now.

S.FORM: yauti tmayta ya sunis a yau aizipna ta wasuna.
S.PHON: jauti tmajta ja sunis a jau aiz~ripna ta wasuna.
S.FORM: yauti tmayta ya sunis a yau aizipna ta wasuna.
S.PHON: jauti tmajta ja sunis a jau aiz~ripna ta wasuna.
S.TRANSL: The child was looking at his dog.

S.FORM: qenalizaqan tmayta ta biyatna ta uzusati.
S.PHON: qənariz~raqan tmajta ta βijatna ta uz~rusati.
S.FORM: qenalizaqan tmayta ta biyatna ta uzusati.
S.PHON: qənariz~raqan tmajta ta βijatna ta uz~rusati.

TRANSL.notes: (小孩)很高興看到他的青蛙…變成兩隻.

S.TRANSL: 很高興看到他的青蛙…變成兩隻.

TRANSL.notes: (The child) was glad to see his frog…two frogs.

S.TRANSL: was glad to see his frog…two frogs.

S.FORM: zau nani sunis a yau nani yauti Ray wasuna qaya lilizaqti sayza tmayta ta wa ta biyatna nani.
S.PHON: z~rau nani sunis a jau nani jauti ʁaj wasuna qaja ririz~raqti sajz~ra tmajta ta wa ta βijatna nani.
S.FORM: zau nani sunis a yau nani yauti Ray wasuna qaya lilizaqti sayza tmayta ta wa ta biyatna nani.
S.PHON: z~rau nani sunis a jau nani jauti ʁaj wasuna qaja ririz~raqti sajz~ra tmajta ta wa ta βijatna nani.
S.TRANSL: 小孩和他的狗可能很高興看到他們的青蛙.
Perhaps the child and his dog were glad to see their frog.

S.FORM: wiyati mwaza zinna biyatna.
S.PHON: wijati mwaz~ra z~rinna βijatna.
S.FORM: wiyati mwaza zinna biyatna.
S.PHON: wijati mwaz~ra z~rinna βijatna.
S.TRANSL: The number of frogs became greater.

S.FORM: mwazati ya biyatna na mlizaqti ya sunis a yau tmayta ta biyat a yau zinna.
S.PHON: mwaz~rati ja βijatna na mriz~raqti ja sunis a jau tmajta ta βijat a jau z~rinna.
S.FORM: mwazati ya biyatna na mlizaqti ya sunis a yau tmayta ta biyat a yau zinna.
S.PHON: mwaz~rati ja βijatna na mriz~raqti ja sunis a jau tmajta ta βijat a jau z~rinna.
S.TRANSL: 有很多青蛙.小孩很高興看到青蛙.
There were many frogs. The child was glad to see the frogs.

S.FORM: spaR qmRas a.
S.PHON: spaʁ qmʁas a.
S.FORM: spaR qmRas a.
S.PHON: spaʁ qmʁas a.

S.FORM: yau malusiq a biyat a yau nani.
S.PHON: jau marusiq a βijat a jau nani.
S.FORM: yau malusiq a biyat a yau nani.
S.PHON: jau marusiq a βijat a jau nani.

S.FORM: waliwti mazmun a biyat a yau zinna.
S.PHON: wariwti maz~rmun a βijat a jau z~rinna.
S.FORM: waliwti mazmun a biyat a yau zinna.
S.PHON: wariwti maz~rmun a βijat a jau z~rinna.
S.TRANSL: However, there were many frogs now.

S.FORM: zau nani qu mlizaqtiiku nengiti anemku.
S.PHON: z~rau nani qu mriz~raqtiiku nəŋiti anəmku.
S.FORM: zau nani qu mlizaqtiiku nengiti anemku.
S.PHON: z~rau nani qu mriz~raqtiiku nəŋiti anəmku.
S.TRANSL: I feel happy. I feel good.

S.FORM: zinna sayza tazian pasababaw tu lima sunis a yau zinna.
S.PHON: z~rinna sajz~ra taz~rian pasaβaβaw tu rima sunis a jau z~rinna.
S.FORM: zinna sayza tazian pasababaw tu lima sunis a yau zinna.
S.PHON: z~rinna sajz~ra taz~rian pasaβaβaw tu rima sunis a jau z~rinna.

TRANSL.notes: Here, the child raised his hands (to cheer).

S.TRANSL: Here, the child raised his hands .

S.FORM: yauti ya mazmun a biyatna.
S.PHON: jauti ja maz~rmun a βijatna.
S.FORM: yauti ya mazmun a biyatna.
S.PHON: jauti ja maz~rmun a βijatna.
S.TRANSL: There were many of his frogs.

S.FORM: yau a wasuna.
S.PHON: jau a wasuna.
S.FORM: yau a wasuna.
S.PHON: jau a wasuna.

S.FORM: mai naquni.
S.PHON: mai naquni.
S.FORM: mai naquni.
S.PHON: mai naquni.

S.FORM: m yau Raybunan na biyatna mwazati biyatna na.
S.PHON: m jau ʁajβunan na βijatna mwaz~rati βijatna na.
S.FORM: m yau Raybunan na biyatna mwazati biyatna na.
S.PHON: m jau ʁajβunan na βijatna mwaz~rati βijatna na.
S.TRANSL: 他的青蛙站在那邊.有很多青蛙.
His frog stood there. There were many frogs.

S.FORM: mlizaqti nani.
S.PHON: mriz~raqti nani.
S.FORM: mlizaqti nani.
S.PHON: mriz~raqti nani.

S.FORM: pasababawti tu lima sunis a zau zinna.
S.PHON: pasaβaβawti tu rima sunis a z~rau z~rinna.
S.FORM: pasababawti tu lima sunis a zau zinna.
S.PHON: pasaβaβawti tu rima sunis a z~rau z~rinna.

S.FORM: XXXX nayau.
S.PHON: **** najau.
S.FORM: XXXX nayau.
S.PHON: **** najau.

S.FORM: nayau ma.
S.PHON: najau ma.
S.FORM: nayau ma.
S.PHON: najau ma.
